meaning: n.(大学)毕业生,研究生v.(使)(大学)毕业
examples: After all his hard work, he now needs only two credit hours to graduate.
The Voyager workload is divided among 157 scientists and scads of graduate students.
Fifty-nine percent of its residents have attended graduate school – quadruple the national average.
He was a graduate of the School of Medicine at Padua, the best in Europe.
Smerconish is a 1984 Phi Beta Kappa graduate of Lehigh University where he majored in government and journalism.
